name: hacker-news-daily-digest
description: Fetches the top 20 Hacker News front-page stories hourly and on dashboard Run now requests, stores them, and shows server-backed Stories and History tabs.

agent_metadata.primary_users: Hacker News readers who want a persisted hourly and on-demand front-page dashboard
agent_metadata.automation_type: Scheduled and manual dashboard data refresh
agent_metadata.schedule_description: Once per hour in UTC, plus dashboard Run now requests
